summary: The WaveField geometry system and ModeManager integration were already implemented. WaveField (src/visual/systems/waveField.ts) renders layered sine waves responding to all VisualParams: bass drives amplitude, treble drives line width/alpha/shimmer, cadence+motionAmplitude control phase speed, pointer disturbance warps waves locally, and colors derive from paletteHue with per-wave hueOffset. It's registered in main.ts alongside ParticleField with quality-tier-appropriate config. The ModeManager auto-switches between modes on seeded 90-180s intervals. All 25 tests pass, build succeeds with no type errors.
